   ],
   "source": [
    "import nltk\n",
    "from collections import defaultdict, Counter\n",
    "import random\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "nltk.download('punkt')\n",
    "\n",
    "from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "e3327e67",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Sample training corpus\n",
    "corpus = \"\"\"\n",
    "Natural language processing is a field of artificial intelligence.\n",
    "Natural language understanding is important for chatbots.\n",
    "Language models are used for text prediction and auto completion.\n",
    "Auto complete systems help users type faster.\n",
    "\"\"\""
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "689555e5",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "===== AUTOCOMPLETE OUTPUT =====\n",
      "\n",
      "Input: natural language\n",
      "Suggestions: ['processing', 'understanding']\n",
      "\n",
      "Input: language models\n",
      "Suggestions: ['are']\n",
      "\n",
      "Input: auto complete\n",
      "Suggestions: ['systems']\n",
      "\n",
      "Input: artificial\n",
      "Suggestions: ['intelligence']\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "tokens = word_tokenize(corpus.lower())\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build N-gram model\n",
    "def build_ngram_model(tokens, n):\n",
    "    model = defaultdict(Counter)\n",
    "    for i in range(len(tokens) - n + 1):\n",
    "        context = tuple(tokens[i:i+n-1])\n",
    "        next_word = tokens[i+n-1]\n",
    "        model[context][next_word] += 1\n",
    "    return model\n",
    "\n",
    "bigram_model = build_ngram_model(tokens, 2)\n",
    "trigram_model = build_ngram_model(tokens, 3)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Predict next word\n",
    "def predict_next_word(context, model, top_k=3):\n",
    "    context = tuple(context.lower().split())\n",
    "    if context in model:\n",
    "        return model[context].most_common(top_k)\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        return []\n",
    "\n",
    "# Autocomplete\n",
    "def autocomplete(text):\n",
    "    words = word_tokenize(text.lower())\n",
    "    \n",
    "    if len(words) >= 2:\n",
    "        context = \" \".join(words[-2:])\n",
    "        preds = predict_next_word(context, trigram_model)\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        context = words[-1]\n",
    "        preds = predict_next_word(context, bigram_model)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return preds\n",
    "\n",
    "# Test inputs\n",
    "inputs = [\n",
    "    \"natural language\",\n",
    "    \"language models\",\n",
    "    \"auto complete\",\n",
    "    \"artificial\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"===== AUTOCOMPLETE OUTPUT =====\")\n",
    "results = {}\n",
    "\n",
    "for text in inputs:\n",
    "    preds = autocomplete(text)\n",
    "    words = [w for w, _ in preds]\n",
    "    counts = [c for _, c in preds]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    results[text] = counts\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print(f\"\\nInput: {text}\")\n",
    "    print(\"Suggestions:\", words)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "8001cb4e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {

       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {

      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Plot 1: Frequency of predictions per input\n",
    "plt.figure()\n",
    "for text, counts in results.items():\n",
    "    plt.plot(counts, marker='o', label=text)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"Prediction Frequency per Input\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Top Suggestions Rank\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot 2: Total frequency distribution\n",
    "all_counts = []\n",
    "for counts in results.values():\n",
    "    all_counts.extend(counts)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure()\n",
    "plt.hist(all_counts, bins=5)\n",
    "plt.title(\"Distribution of Prediction Frequencies\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Count\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot 3: Bar chart for one example\n",
    "sample_input = \"natural language\"\n",
    "preds = autocomplete(sample_input)\n",
    "\n",
    "words = [w for w, _ in preds]\n",
    "counts = [c for _, c in preds]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure()\n",
    "plt.bar(words, counts)\n",
    "plt.title(f\"Top Predictions for '{sample_input}'\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Predicted Words\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  }
 ],
